_description: Wave 198: bart-objections running bit. ~32s. Status: SCRIPT BANKED, video_url fields are TODO — Christopher generates Higgsfield clips from Bart's existing portrait reference frame before compose-cartoon.py runs.
title: Bart Files an Objection

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
OBJECTION #47

Filed this morning by
the Senior Cataloguer
segments.narration: Objection number forty-seven. Filed this morning by the Senior Cataloguer.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. CRITICAL: 'forty-seven' delivered as a flat number, no emphasis. Falling tone on 'cataloguer'.

segments.name: bart_at_desk
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Bart at desk, slowly stapling a document. Reference his existing portrait. Slight head shake.
segments.narration: The subject was the trombone. Pitch unspecified.
segments.instructions: Two short sentences. Flat. 'Pitch unspecified' said as if reading from a form.

segments.name: bart_filing
segments.video_url: TODO: generate Higgsfield clip — Bart sliding a manila folder into a file cabinet drawer. Methodical.
segments.narration: The objection has been filed under T, between Toaster, Heritage and Truss, Roof.
segments.instructions: Read as if quoting a filing-system catalog card. No comedic inflection — the comedy is in the bureaucratic specificity.

segments.name: closing_tag
segments.instructions: One short sentence. Falling tone. Final beat.
